app.name: GemmPen
app.tagline: Feedback on handwritten work, all on your own computer.
dashboard.title: Welcome
dashboard.lead: Four steps from a scanned paper to finished feedback.
dashboard.now: Start by setting up your subject. Then you can upload student work.
dashboard.next: After that: upload, check, assess and save as a sheet.
dashboard.step.setup.desc: Set the task, what you expect, and your marking scheme.
dashboard.step.upload.desc: Read in a phone photo or a scanned sheet.
dashboard.step.review.desc: Look over the recognised text and confirm it.
dashboard.step.assess.desc: Review the suggestions, adjust them, and save a feedback sheet.
setup.title: Set up a subject
setup.now: Answer the questions about your subject and your task.
setup.next: After that you can upload student work for this subject.
setup.step1.title: Subject and setting
setup.step1.now: Describe the subject, language, year group and level.
setup.step1.next: After that you will enter the task.
setup.step1.subject: Subject
setup.step1.error.subject: Please enter a subject.
setup.step2.title: The task
setup.step2.now: Type the task, or upload it as a file.
setup.step2.next: After that you will enter what a good answer covers.
setup.step2.textarea.label: Task
setup.step2.textarea.placeholder: What is the task about? What should students write?
setup.step2.upload.label: Or upload a file
setup.step2.upload.hint: Text files (.txt, .md) are used straight away. For a PDF or a photo, the content is read later, during assessment.
setup.step2.upload.pendingNote: The content of this file is read during assessment. For now, add a short note in your own words about what the task covers, so the suggestion in the next step fits.
setup.step2.error.taskPrompt: Please enter or upload a task.
setup.step3.title: What counts, and the marking scheme
setup.step3.now: Enter what a good answer should cover. The system will then suggest a marking scheme.
setup.step3.next: After that you will set the grading scale and feedback style.
setup.step3.expected.label: What a good answer covers
setup.step3.expected.hint: One point per line, for example: Introduction names the topic.
setup.step3.expected.placeholder:
Introduction names the topic and states a position
First argument with an example
...
setup.step3.upload.label: Or upload a file
setup.step3.generate.error: The draft did not work. You can try again, or type the criteria yourself.
setup.step3.usingMock: The system is not reachable right now. This is a test draft so you can keep working.
setup.step3.startFromExample: Or start from an example configuration
setup.step3.criteria.title: Criteria
setup.step3.criteria.empty: No criteria yet. Get a suggestion, or add your own.
setup.step3.criteria.name: Name
setup.step3.criteria.allOrNothing.hint: Full points only when every part is present, otherwise zero points.
setup.step3.criteria.allOrNothing.parts: Parts (one per line, at least two)
setup.step3.error.expected: Please enter what a good answer covers.
setup.step3.error.criteria: Please add at least one criterion.
setup.step4.title: Grading scale and feedback style
setup.step4.now: Choose the grading scale and the tone of the feedback.
setup.step4.next: After that you can optionally add sample papers for calibration.
setup.step4.includePractice.hint: Adds a short, concrete practice suggestion at the end.
setup.step5.title: Sample papers and calibration
setup.step5.now: Optional: add 1-2 sample papers you have already marked, and run the calibration.
setup.step5.next: After that comes the summary and saving.
setup.step5.intro: This step is optional. Sample papers show how well the system matches your own marking.
setup.step5.sample.textPlaceholder: Paste or type the student text here.
setup.step5.addLimit: You can add up to two sample papers.
setup.step5.error: Calibration did not work. Check that all criteria and points are filled in.
setup.step5.usingMock: The system is not reachable right now. This is a test run so you can see how it works.
setup.step5.result.title: Difference per criterion
setup.step5.result.explain.low: The system is close to your own judgement.
setup.step5.result.explain.mid: There is a noticeable difference. It may help to look again at the descriptors for this criterion.
setup.step5.result.explain.high: There is a large difference. Check the descriptors and the all-or-nothing rule for this criterion again.
setup.step6.title: Summary
setup.step6.now: Check the details and save the configuration.
setup.step6.next: After that you can upload student work for this subject.
setup.step6.name: Display name for this configuration
setup.step6.name.hint: This is how you will find this configuration again in your subject list.
setup.step6.error.title: Please sort out these points before saving
setup.step6.toUpload: Upload student work for this subject
subjects.title: My subjects
subjects.now: Pick a subject or set up a new one.
subjects.next: After that you can upload matching student work.
subjects.card.subject: Subject
subjects.card.delete.confirmText: This cannot be undone. Work already assessed with this configuration stays as it is.
templates.title: Printable templates
templates.hint: Print a template before the class writes the paper. The scanning guide shows how to bring the sheets back in afterwards.
upload.title: Upload student work
upload.now: Drag photos or scanned sheets here, or choose files.
upload.next: After that you will see every page and can check the text.
upload.round.label: Name for this batch
upload.round.hint: For example the class and the date. This helps you find the work again later.
upload.drop.title: Drag files here
upload.drop.hint: Photos (JPG, PNG, HEIC) or scanned PDFs. Several sheets in one PDF are fine.
upload.file.error: That did not work. Please try again.
upload.file.skipped: This file does not fit. Please use a photo or a PDF.
upload.gallery.title: Recognised pages
upload.gallery.now: Assign each page a student code.
upload.gallery.next: After that you can check the recognised text.
upload.badge.notDetected: Template not recognised, results may be less exact
upload.assign.label: Student code
review.title: Check the text
review.now: Look over the recognised text and confirm what is right.
review.next: After that you can have the work assessed.
review.round.label: Batch
review.recognize.title: Start recognition
review.recognize.hint: Reads the text of every paper that is not yet confirmed. This can take a moment with a larger batch.
review.recognize.inProgress: Please wait, this can take a few minutes for a larger batch.
review.recognize.placeholder: The reading service was not reachable. For now a sample text is shown so you can see the flow. Start the service and read the papers again to get the real text.
review.run.error: Recognition could not be started. Please try again.
review.list.title: Papers in this batch
review.list.empty: No papers in this batch yet.
review.detail.title: Check the text
review.detail.now: Look over the unclear spots and fix each one.
review.detail.now.done: This paper is checked and confirmed.
review.detail.next: After that the paper can be assessed.
review.detail.unclearHint: {{count}} unclear spot(s) left. Click a highlighted spot and fix it in the field below.
review.detail.noLines: No text has been recognised yet.
review.detail.lineUnclear: This line still needs a decision.
review.detail.confirmReady: All unclear spots are settled. This paper is ready to confirm.
review.detail.confirmBlocked: There are still {{count}} unclear spot(s). Fix each one before confirming.
review.detail.confirmedNote: This paper is confirmed and ready for assessment.
review.detail.confirmError: Confirmation did not work. Please check if there are still unclear spots.
assess.title: Assess
assess.now: Look at the suggestions for each area and adjust them if you like.
assess.next: After that you release the work and save the feedback sheet.
assess.round.label: Batch
assess.config.title: Subject configuration for this batch
assess.config.hintMissing: Choose which marking scheme applies to this batch.
assess.config.hintSet: This marking scheme applies to the batch. You can choose a different one.
assess.run.title: Start assessment
assess.run.hint: Marks every checked and confirmed paper: checks the content, scores each criterion, and creates feedback.
assess.run.inProgress: Please wait, this can take a few minutes for a larger batch.
assess.run.needsConfig: Please choose a subject configuration for this batch first.
assess.run.error: Assessment could not be started. Please try again.
assess.error.noConfig: No subject configuration is set for this paper.
assess.error.unknown: This paper could not be marked just now. Please try again.
assess.list.title: Papers in this batch
assess.list.empty: No checked and confirmed paper in this batch yet.
assess.detail.title: Assess
assess.detail.now: Review the points, reasoning and feedback. Adjust as needed.
assess.detail.next: After that you release the paper.
assess.detail.notAssessedYet: This paper has not been assessed yet. Start the assessment from the overview.
assess.detail.summary.title: Overall summary
assess.detail.criteria.title: Criteria
assess.detail.feedback.title: Feedback draft
assess.detail.actions.title: Save and release
assess.detail.actions.hint: Save your changes before releasing the paper. Releasing makes it ready for export.
assess.detail.actions.releasedNote: This paper is released and ready for export.
assess.detail.releaseError: Release did not work. Please try again.
export.title: Save feedback
export.now: Download the feedback sheet for every released paper.
export.next: After that you hand out the sheets to the class.
export.round.label: Batch
export.released.title: Download feedback sheets
export.released.summary: {{released}} of {{total}} papers are released and ready for export.
export.released.empty: No paper in this batch is released yet.
export.classOverview.title: Class overview
export.classOverview.hint: A table with alias, points per area, and overall grade for every released paper in this batch.
export.classOverview.emptyHint: As soon as one paper is released, you can download the overview.
export.pending.title: Not ready for export yet
export.pending.hint: These papers are not released yet. Finish the matching step so they show up here.
export.dpo.title: Correction file for the next assessment round
export.dpo.explainer: Every change you made to points or texts while assessing is collected here. This file helps the assessment get more accurate next time. It stays on your computer, nothing is uploaded.
export.dpo.count: {{count}} corrections are available for this batch.
export.dpo.empty: There are no corrections for this batch yet.
export.error.download: The download did not work. Please try again.
export.error.notReleased: This paper is not released yet.
settings.title: Settings
settings.now: Check your system connection and adjust settings here.
settings.next: After that everything is ready for real work.
settings.connection.title: System connection
settings.connection.startHint: Is Ollama running? It needs to be on this computer for handwriting reading and marking to work.
settings.models.title: System models for reading and marking
settings.models.hint: These names decide which system reads the handwriting and which one does the marking. Only change them if you know which models are actually loaded on this computer.
settings.models.notLoaded: Is not loaded yet. Load it in Ollama with "ollama pull".
settings.models.unknown: Cannot be checked until the system is connected.
settings.models.defaultsNotice: The starting names are common Gemma models. Please check once whether these names match what is actually loaded on this computer.
ollama.error.unreachable: The system is not connected. Is Ollama running?
ollama.error.timeout: The system is taking too long. Please wait a moment and try again.
ollama.error.modelMissing: The chosen reading is not loaded. Load it in Ollama with "ollama pull", or enter a different name in Settings.
ollama.error.badResponse: The system sent an unexpected answer. Please try again.
ollama.error.invalidInput: This request could not be sent. Please check the settings.
recognize.error.imageMissing: No image was found for this page. Please upload the page again.
recognize.error.unknown: Something went sideways while reading this paper. Please try again.
